description: The LegacyRendererSwitcher component is used to switch between different rendering types depending on meshes.

fields.ParticleMesh: The particle mesh object when not null will use ``MeshRenderer`` for the renderer.
fields.BillboardRenderer: Can be switched to in order to render the particles as squares.
fields.MeshRenderer: Can be switched to in order to render the particles as meshes.
fields.RendererDrive: Drives the target field with ``BillboardRenderer`` or ``MeshRenderer`` depending on if ``ParticleMesh`` is null.
